[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +7 Charge Count

[OnSucceedAttack] Gain +10 Charge Count

[EndSkill] Gain +10 Charge Count

2020411.name: Adaptive Release
2020411.desc:
While this unit has [Charge], deal +2% damage per Charge Count.
Skills spend -2 Charge Count.
